title: lupinus nootkatensis var. fruticosus
intro: Lupinus nootkatensis var. fruticosus, also known as Nootka lupine or Nootka Island lupine, is a variety of flowering plant that belongs to the lupine family. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly for its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects, which may help to treat various health issues. The plant has been reported to have potential health benefits, including reducing pain, improving digestion, and acting as an antioxidant. Lupinus nootkatensis var. fruticosus can be prepared into herbal remedies such as teas, tinctures, and infusions, although more research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety.
